name: ErrorPath
title: Error Path
description:
The [FHIRPath](https://www.hl7.org/fhirpath/) expression that indicates which FHIR element that this error information is about.  The expression will start with the Bundle and can be followed to determine the specific element.

STU NOTE: We would like feedback during the STU period on whether this extension is sufficient for implementers to determine and display the errored element.

Examples: Bundle.entry[1].resource.name, Bundle.entry[0].resource.identifier[0].value

element.definition:
